name: Trump Headquarters
subject: re: has Peter answered?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
This will just take two seconds. |
---
| | |

Peter,

The President has asked us to reach out to some of our top supporters for a one-question poll, and as one of our best, you've been chosen to participate.

**Please take a moment to choose one of the options below to answer the following:**

The President's job performance has been...
**[GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d9878a574514719490c19ff802e883edc387d36e6ade61d1f7236654a04cdd988c776ae969b847195ed22e616c72d94a)** **[GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d9878a57451471948a73154b07745eece5e0400968957dabb4dc5dcbc8dbd0fc5d0a2726708a78a72dc59ed341abc42c)** **[OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d9878a5745147194fca38733ded338b5c15a944b5ba90763b4334688370d85de5f70cc8caf9edcdd9d3f3d035a28304e)** **[OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d9878a57451471947c267c9bc7e579473d09705ebc44b5a333f8d770aecf9316e604b5ad646d92210bdabba85cd7ec15)**
Thank you for your input, Peter.

**We 'll be sure to pass it along to President Trump.**

Presidential Polling
Team Trump
---
[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d9878a5745147194480e9d166195ef2c567301b3417706f60d9eb3c8c958c28d376f10f734b7512017860940ba5b8008)
---

[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d9878a5745147194b1f0abb1c1841c9d7b342ae51c5643442446c4ab76fb6050ff69291fe3ce13a723603084ab80700d) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d9878a574514719484d073bd6871c28620cfd2b93a8be06e7b22a3aed0e2c306a6254cc9ef231e90d0387d9c7b46c637) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d9878a574514719411c96510f7394b8da578797e4e25a2050d5c7c971be9a142c31ef815ada0998ac726b8e9924bb611) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d484605a39067d14dd7dc7f7d53f49a9803bc8d4ce172bd14024b)

name: Keith Ellison
subject: I wish I could say I was surprised, Derek
body:
Racism has no home in the White House.
---
**Tell Trump to fire Seb Gorka, Stephen Miller, and every white supremacist in his administration.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fire-White-Supremacists1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170819_ke_nd&source=em_20170819_ke_nd")**
Derek --

When Donald Trump finally brought himself to speak out on the terrible events in Charlottesville this past weekend, he didn't condemn hatred or white supremacy or people who marched wearing swastikas on their arms. He blamed "many sides."

And as he's continued to address the nation in the days that have followed, he's made it clear that he accepts the support of the violent, white supremacist mob because he thinks it will help him politically. I wish I could say I was surprised.

One of my favorite poets, Maya Angelou, once said: "When someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time." Donald Trump started his campaign with hate, and we knew his presidency would be no different after he surrounded himself with men -- like Steve Bannon, Seb Gorka, and Stephen Miller -- who have given these vile groups platforms to speak on.

He showed us who he was and what he stood for the first time.

So if Donald Trump can ever truly reject hate, he needs to start by removing the enablers of white supremacy from his administration. Firing Steve Bannon -- as thousands of us called for -- is a start, but he needs to do more.

**Words alone are not enough. Tell Donald Trump to take action against hate:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fire-White-Supremacists1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170819_ke_nd&source=em_20170819_ke_nd")**
Thank you,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523786/4067b0a/3d4d91d3f/7e6f1909/3668512313/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170819_ke_nd&source=em_20170819_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523786/4067b0a/3d4d91d3f/7e6f1916/3668512313/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170819_ke_nd&source=em_20170819_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523786/4067b0a/3d4d91d3f/7e6f1917/3668512313/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170819_ke_nd&source=em_20170819_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523786/4067b0a/3d4d91d3f/7e6f1914/3668512313/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170819_ke_nd&source=em_20170819_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

I wish I could say I was surprised. One of my favorite poets, Maya Angelou, once said: "When someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time." Donald Trump started his campaign with hate, and we knew his presidency would be no different after he surrounded himself with men -- like Steve Bannon, Seb Gorka, and Stephen Miller -- who have given these vile groups platforms to speak on. He showed us who he was and what he stood for the first time. So if Donald Trump can ever truly reject hate, he needs to start by removing the enablers of white supremacy from his administration. Firing Steve Bannon -- as thousands of us called for -- is a start, but he needs to do more. Words alone are not enough. Tell Donald Trump to take action against hate: "" Thank you, Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: CNN: Joe third most likely to lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27fc/7377f838/379237a8/51fbc991/3109310755/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | **CNN: Indiana Senate Seat _Third Most Likely_ to Flip in 2018** Peter -- CNN just named Joe the **_third most_ vulnerable senator up for re-election this cycle**. Republicans are already pouring money into Indiana to attack Joe, and this news will grab the attention of even more GOP mega donors.

**Look, nobody works harder for Hoosiers than Joe.** With your support, he played a crucial role in blocking Trumpcare, defended our public education from budget cuts, advocated for our servicemembers and veterans, and fought to fund programs to get Hoosiers back to work.

**But here 's the thing: Big-money special interest groups don't care about what he's doing for Hoosiers.** They just care about having a rubber stamp in Joe's seat -- and when they see that CNN says he's vulnerable, it means they can feel even more confident about throwing more money into his race.

Joe's race will be competitive and expensive, Peter. Every dollar will count -- from now until Election Day. **Can you pitch in so we can fight every step of the way to keep Joe in the Senate?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27fc/7377f838/379237a8/51fbc993/3109310755/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-cnn?refcode=20170819no")****
